summary: Tested new Job Matching feature and enriched Observatoire/Evolution endpoints. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: 'Matching' tab in navigation, Job Matching page with correct title and invitation message for users without CV, data-testid attributes present.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue (pre-existing)

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/jobs/matching endpoint (jobs.py line 12-155): Returns has_data=false when no CV, returns matches with matching_score when CV exists - VERIFIED
Response includes profile_summary with titre, skills_count, has_optimized_cv when has_data=true - VERIFIED
GET /api/observatoire/personalized (observatoire.py line 153-317): Enriched with cv_models data for richer skill analysis - VERIFIED
GET /api/evolution-index/user-profile (evolution.py line 90-208): Enriched with cv_models data, includes data_sources field - VERIFIED
Frontend Dashboard.jsx line 135: Navigation shows 'Job Matching' with shortLabel 'Matching' - VERIFIED
Frontend ParticulierView.jsx JobsSection: Shows invitation message when no CV, displays match cards with matching_score when CV exists - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - tests create their own test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Job Matching feature fully tested. Backend endpoint GET /api/jobs/matching?token= returns has_data=false with empty matches array and message when no CV analyzed. When CV exists, returns has_data=true with matches array containing matching_score (0-100), competences_matchees badges, and profile_summary with titre, skills_count, has_optimized_cv. Frontend JobsSection (data-testid='jobs-section') shows invitation message for users without CV, displays job-match-card-{i} cards with matching-score element when matches exist. Navigation shows 'Matching' tab (not 'Emplois'). Observatoire and Evolution endpoints now pull from cv_models collection for enriched skill data.
